_note: Continuous heat + Maillard kinetics primitive (v2.1). Newton lumped-capacitance T(t)=T_env+(T0−T_env)·e^(−t/τ) with per-ingredient τ (minutes). Maillard: dB/dt=k(T), k=k0·e^(−Ea/RT). egg_zones (v2): two-zone white/yolk model for boil doneness. ALL constants seeded estimates — verify:true until cited via src.

maillard._note: Ea ~80–96 kJ/mol; k(T)=k0·exp(−Ea/R·(1/T−1/T_ref)) gated below onset; k0 seeded for golden brown at ~40 m pan fry

default_tau_min._note: lumped thermal time constants by catalog group (minutes, seeded)

egg_zones._note: Two-zone boil model: white heats faster (near bath), yolk lags (centre). Doneness from seeded coagulation thresholds — output quality tracks inputs only.

cool_storage._note: Item R: cool-down + temperature-scaled keep-life. Seeded estimates — verify:true; cite a regional food-safety authority for danger-zone limits before trusting. keep_eff only re-scales the cited CATALOG.keep (treated as keep at T_ref_store_C); it never invents an absolute shelf-life.
